events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Cryovolcanic eruption 200km north — ground tremors felt.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

meta_awareness.insight: Dax Iron dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Nova Sol dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Moss Stone wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
Haze Cliff wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.
